channel.title: Gabriel E. Lima
channel.description: Recent content on Gabriel E. Lima

item.title: About
item.description: Hello! My name is Gabriel Eduardo Lima, I’m 20 years old and I’m from Pomerode - small city in Santa Catarina state, in south of Brazil. I’m currently enrolled in an undergraduate program in Computer Science, offered by IFC - Campus Blumenau. After completing the course, I aim to develop an academic career joining a graduate program. Topics of interest Link to heading Artificial Intelligence, focusing on Machine Learning; Computer Vision; Image processing.

item.title: First post
item.description: The first post will be posted soon… You are welcome to come back later and check it!

item.title: Drone path programming using images and python
item.description: Basic info Link to heading Type: High school project (technician course) Period: Year 2019 Area: Image processing Authors: Gabriel Eduardo Lima and Thiago Vinicius de Oliveira Hornburg Instructors: Hylson Vescovi Netto and Deivis Elton Schlickmann Frainer About Link to heading The project consists on applying computing and mathematics knowledge in order to create automated trajectories for drones. Image analyzis and interpretation is done by software implemented in Python (3.7.0) with the Pillow library (5.

item.title: DRØMME: A 2D shooting game proposal
item.description: Basic info Link to heading Type: High school project (technician course) Period: Year 2018 Area: Game development Authors: Gabriel Eduardo Lima, Guilherme Eduardo Kuglin, Thiago Vinicius de Oliveira Hornburg and Timóteo Rafael Janzen Instructors: Adriano Pessini, Eder Augusto Penharbel e Ricardo de la Rocha Ladeira About Link to heading DRØMME consists of a simple 2D shooting game. It is set in a post-zombie apocalypse world, where the player must face and eliminate all enemies to progress through the stages.

item.title: Contact
item.description: Get in touch sending an e-mail to: limaedugabriel@gmail.com
